### Formalizing a proof in LEAN using LLM
Original code and video:
* https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JHEO7cplfk8
* https://github.com/teorth/analysis/blob/main/analysis/Analysis/Misc/equational.lean
* https://leanprover.zulipchat.com/#narrow/channel/458659-Equational/topic/Alternative.20proofs.20of.20E1689.E2.8A.A2E2/near/517189582

### Files
* equational.lean : the proof
* prompts.md : the output of the chat conversation
* equational.*.lean : trajectory of proof
* test*.lean : test files generated by the LLM agent
* shell.nix : nix shell related file
* lakefile.toml : lean environment related file

### Environment
```
nixos-version
25.11.6220.6d41bc27aaf7 (Xantusia)
```

### Lean 4 Commands
```
lake setup-file equational.lean
lake update # Fetch dependencies
lake exe cache get # Download precompiled Mathlib
lake build
# lake env lean equational.lean
```
